programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: US police officers use personal cameras to record dramatic and tense pursuits of murderers.They reveal the behind-the-scenes of investigations.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes
programme.desc: US police officers use personal cameras to record dramatic and tense pursuits of murderers.They reveal the behind-the-scenes of investigations.

programme.title: Shattered 3
programme.desc: Viewers will see what impact cruel crimes and offenses have on the lives of victims and witnesses, as well as what the consequences are for those involved.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: The series presents difficult-to-solve crime puzzles.Their unraveling will only be possible by reconstructing the last moments of the victim's life.

programme.title: The Perfect Murder
programme.desc: The series presents difficult-to-solve crime puzzles.Their unraveling will only be possible by reconstructing the last moments of the victim's life.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath 2
programme.sub-title: Meeting with the angel of death
programme.desc: Profiles of the most brutal murderers of modern times.Viewers will see film materials as well as interviews with the killers themselves.They reveal their terrifying personality traits.

programme.title: American Detective With Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: Well-known and experienced policeman Joe Kenda reveals the behind-the-scenes of the most brutal and strangest crimes committed in the USA.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.sub-title: When the Children Sleep - Olympia, Washington
programme.desc: Medium Amy Allen and former detective Steve DiSchiavi investigate paranormal phenomena.Amy discovers the presence of unknown forces, while Steve analyzes each event from an investigative perspective.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK
programme.desc: Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman are renowned paranormal experts.To investigate disturbing phenomena, they spend three days in haunted places located in Great Britain.

programme.title: Paranormal Lockdown UK
programme.desc: Nick Groff and Katrina Weidman are renowned paranormal experts.To investigate disturbing phenomena, they spend three days in haunted places located in Great Britain.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Jack Osbourne and Katrina Weidman resume their travels to haunted places in the US, confronting supernatural forces and searching for evidence of the existence of the spirit world.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates

programme.title: Grave Mysteries 2
programme.desc: Investigation Discovery provides true crime documentaries, real-life investigations, and mystery-focused programming.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones 5
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a journalist of the New York Times, returns to high-profile crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Conducts its own investigations.

programme.title: True Crime with Aphrodite Jones 5
programme.desc: Aphrodite Jones, a journalist of the New York Times, returns to high-profile crime mysteries that have interested the American public in recent years.Conducts its own investigations.

programme.title: Chaos in Court
programme.desc: In the courtroom, situations often arise when nervous people lose their temper.Viewers will learn about the everyday life of lawyers, judges, prosecutors and forensic psychologists.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the most stunning and thrilling courtroom moments caught on camera.

programme.title: Chaos In Court
programme.desc: An in-depth look at some of the most stunning and thrilling courtroom moments caught on camera.

programme.title: Web of Lies 3
programme.desc: Dark stories that serve as a warning against making friends in cyberspace.The characters of the series are people who fell into the trap of dangerous criminals looking for victims on the Internet.

programme.title: Web of Lies 3
programme.desc: Dark stories that serve as a warning against making friends in cyberspace.The characters of the series are people who fell into the trap of dangerous criminals looking for victims on the Internet.

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder 2
programme.desc: According to the six degrees of separation hypothesis, it doesn't matter whether we are one or six degrees apart.It turns out that as many as seven billion inhabitants of the world are related to each other by blood, emotional or financial ties.One event can bring completely random people together.Such an event could be murder.This is the second season of the program, which reveals the behind-the-scenes of mysterious investigations.To solve the case, the police must break through a tangled web of human ties and dependencies.

credits.actor: Det. Brian Streit - Kent R. Williams

programme.title: Six Degrees of Murder 2
programme.desc: According to the six degrees of separation hypothesis, it doesn't matter whether we are one or six degrees apart.It turns out that as many as seven billion inhabitants of the world are related to each other by blood, emotional or financial ties.One event can bring completely random people together.Such an event could be murder.This is the second season of the program, which reveals the behind-the-scenes of mysterious investigations.To solve the case, the police must break through a tangled web of human ties and dependencies.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Killer Speaks 2
programme.desc: Visiting the homes of murderers can give you chills.Conversations with prisoners serving sentences for crimes are a controversial and can be traumatic experience.
